name: Kit Machine
explanation: A sample-playback drum machine. Eight short drum one-shots (kick, snare, closed and open hat, clap, tom, rim, cowbell) are baked into the plugin as PCM and played back polyphonically — a true sampler engine, distinct from real-time-synthesised analog drum boxes. A MIDI note selects a voice (note modulo 8) and fires a one-shot; global Tune, Decay, Snap (attack), Tone and Level shape the whole kit. The drum samples are original, self-authored CC0 content synthesised offline (no third-party samples).
